landing.hero_desc: Lumina streamlines administration, empowers teachers, and engages parents. A complete ecosystem designed to elevate the educational experience.
landing.features_subtitle: Everything you need to run your institution efficiently
landing.feat_student_desc: Comprehensive student profiles, attendance tracking, and performance analytics at your fingertips.
landing.feat_curriculum_desc: Manage courses, lesson plans, and automated grading systems with ease and precision.
landing.feat_secure_desc: Enterprise-grade security ensuring your data is protected and accessible whenever you need it.
landing.cta_desc: Join hundreds of institutions already using Lumina to power their growth.
